name.description: Unique name for this worker pool

worker_count.description: Number of worker nodes in this pool

flavor_worker.description: Instance flavor/size for this worker pool

node_worker.description: Node suffix identifier for this worker pool

server_group_affinity.description: Server group affinity policy for this worker pool

image_id.description: OpenStack image ID for this worker pool

worker_node_bfv_delete_on_termination.description: Delete boot volume when instance is terminated

additional_block_devices_worker.description: Additional block devices for this worker pool

pf9_onboard.description: Enable Platform9 onboarding for this pool

subnet_id.description: Specific subnet ID for this worker pool (optional)

name.description: Unique name for this Windows worker pool

worker_count.description: Number of Windows worker nodes in this pool

flavor_worker.description: Instance flavor/size for this Windows worker pool

node_worker.description: Node suffix identifier for this Windows worker pool

server_group_affinity.description: Server group affinity policy for this Windows worker pool

image_id.description: OpenStack Windows image ID for this worker pool

aws_access_key.description: AWS access key for Route53 DNS validation

aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key for Route53 DNS validation

base_domain.description: Base domain for the cluster (e.g. k8s.opencenter.cloud)

cluster_fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name for the cluster

admin_email.description: Administrator email address for certificates and notifications

subnet_nodes.description: CIDR block for Kubernetes node network

allocation_pool_start.description: Start IP for DHCP allocation pool

allocation_pool_end.description: End IP for DHCP allocation pool

vrrp_ip.description: Virtual IP for VRRP (Kubernetes API VIP)

use_octavia.description: Use Octavia load balancer instead of floating IP

ssh_key_path.description: Path to SSH private key for cluster access

encryption_at_rest.description: Enable encryption of secrets at rest

swift_password.description: Swift storage password (deprecated: use application credentials)

k8s_api_port_acl.description: CIDR blocks allowed to access Kubernetes API server

default_storage_class.description: Default storage class for persistent volumes

worker_volume_size.description: Worker node boot volume size in GB

worker_volume_destination_type.description: Worker node boot volume destination type

worker_volume_source_type.description: Worker node boot volume source type

worker_volume_delete_on_termination.description: Delete worker boot volume on instance termination

master_volume_size.description: Master node boot volume size in GB

master_volume_destination_type.description: Master node boot volume destination type

master_volume_source_type.description: Master node boot volume source type

master_volume_delete_on_termination.description: Delete master boot volume on instance termination

additional_block_devices.description: Additional block devices for worker nodes

kubeprism_enabled.description: Enable KubePrism for internal load balancing

system_extensions.description: List of Talos system extensions to install

allowed_cidrs.description: List of CIDRs allowed to access cluster

vcenter_server.description: vCenter server hostname or IP address

vcenter_host.description: vCenter server hostname or IP address

datastoreurl.description: Datastore URL for vSphere CSI storage class

title: OpenCenter Cluster Configuration Schema v2.0
description: JSON schema for OpenCenter cluster configuration files (v2.0)
